name: Thicc-Saken RPG V2!
description:
Yep, that’s right! A remake of my old Thiccsaken bot!

It’s much better now, with accurate character abilities and whatnot!

This is a 300 followers special! Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. I love you all.

Anyway, enjoy!
